scripts.build: npm run build -w @tribus-monitor/core && npm run build -w @tribus-monitor/monitor-api && npm run build -w @tribus-monitor/check-runner && npm run build -w @tribus-monitor/dashboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @tribus-monitor/core && npm run typecheck -w @tribus-monitor/monitor-api && npm run typecheck -w @tribus-monitor/check-runner && npm run typecheck -w @tribus-monitor/dashboard
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @tribus-monitor/core && npm run lint -w @tribus-monitor/monitor-api && npm run lint -w @tribus-monitor/check-runner && npm run lint -w @tribus-monitor/dashboard
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w @tribus-monitor/core && npm run lint:fix -w @tribus-monitor/monitor-api && npm run lint:fix -w @tribus-monitor/check-runner && npm run lint:fix -w @tribus-monitor/dashboard
scripts.test: npm run test -w @tribus-monitor/core && npm run test -w @tribus-monitor/monitor-api && npm run test -w @tribus-monitor/check-runner && npm run test -w @tribus-monitor/dashboard
